candidates.why: Explicit revenue line for main business; forms bulk of operating income.
Includes all operating revenue components including hedging effects and other operating income; best single top-line measure over time.
Financial income, not core operating revenue; not appropriate as primary REVT.

candidates.row_label: Income from associates and joint ventures
candidates.why: Equity-accounted income, not revenue; excluded from REVT.
Financial income, not operating revenue.

candidates.row_label: Interest income on loans and receivables
candidates.why: Component of finance income, not operating revenue.

candidates.row_label: Income Available to Com Excl ExtraOrd
candidates.why: Earnings measure, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Non-controlling interests share of comprehensive income
candidates.why: Allocation of comprehensive income, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Owners of the parents share of comprehensive income
candidates.why: Comprehensive income, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Total comprehensive income, not revenue.
Balance sheet liability, not period revenue line.
Short-term deferred income liability, not revenue.

variables.notes: Uses Total operating income as primary top-line since it aggregates all operating revenue components; Revenue from Sale of Goods is included as a fallback/alternative label for earlier or differently labeled periods.

candidates.why: Primary direct production input costs and closely aligns with cost of goods sold.
Includes both production and overhead labor; partially COGS but also SG&A; used as secondary COGS component.
Mixed operating overhead, more appropriate for SG&A; not ideal as COGS.
Likely part of other operating/overhead items rather than direct COGS.
Non-recurring operating special items, not ongoing COGS.
Net subtotal including many components; not a pure COGS line.
Financing cost, not COGS.
Non-operating, not COGS.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Expense - Government Grants - Supplemental
candidates.why: R&D-related grants, not COGS.
Capitalized R&D, not COGS.
R&D expense, not standard COGS.
Balance sheet item, not period expense.
Inventory asset, not expense flow.

candidates.row_label: Operating materials and spare parts - Net
candidates.why: Inventory-type asset, not expense flow.
Liability, not COGS line.

variables.notes: Maps COGS primarily to direct input costs (Raw materials and energy) and secondarily to Employee benefit expenses, which likely include production labor alongside some overhead.

candidates.why: Operating income, not an expense; excluded per SG&A rules.
Same as above, operating income category, not SG&A expense.
Typical SG&A component (stock-based compensation for employees/executives).
Broad operating overhead bucket, appropriate SG&A component (excluding COGS-specific items).
Additional other operating expense lines; appropriate SG&A components.

variables.notes: Selects explicit overhead expense components and excludes income and totals, in line with SG&A rules.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Expense - Government Grants - Supplemental
candidates.why: R&D-related grants (offsets), not the main gross expense line.
Capitalized portion of R&D; not the period expensed amount alone.
Best representation of R&D expense (expensed portion) for the period.
Intangible asset related to R&D; balance sheet, not period expense.

candidates.row_label: New products development- Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Accumulated amortization/impairment of R&D asset; not current-period R&D expense line.

variables.notes: Uses the explicit R&D expense line; supplemental grant and capitalized lines are adjustments rather than the core expense.

candidates.row_label: Change in fair value commodity contracts interest element
candidates.why: Fair value change related to commodity contracts, not pure interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Write-down / reversal of write down of interest in other companies
candidates.why: Impairment/reversal on investments, not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Direct interest expense measure net of capitalized interest; strong candidate for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Capital Financing - Gross
candidates.why: Gross interest on capital financing; also a strong representation of interest expense.
Capitalized portion of interest; adjustment rather than full expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest portion of lease liabilities; component of total interest expense.
Earnings allocation, unrelated to interest.
Same as above; not interest.

candidates.row_label: Non-controlling interests share of comprehensive income
candidates.why: Comprehensive income allocation, not interest.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; useful fallback but secondary to primary expense lines.

candidates.row_label: Interest in associates and other companies
candidates.why: Investment account, not interest expense.
Debt balance, not period expense.
Debt breakdown, not expense.
Short-term debt, not expense.
Accrued liability, not the expense line itself.
Debt breakdown, not expense.
Equity of minorities, not interest.
Same as above.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Capital Financing - Gross
Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Provides a priority list of interest expense labels: gross capital financing interest first, then net-of-capitalized interest, then lease interest as a component.

candidates.row_label: Share of profit(loss) from equity accounted investments
candidates.why: Income from associates, not equity.

candidates.row_label: Share of other comprehensive income (loss) from equity accounted companies
candidates.why: OCI from associates, not equity level.

candidates.row_label: Share of profit(loss) from equity accounted financial investment
candidates.why: Income line, not equity.

candidates.row_label: Change in fair value of equity instruments
candidates.why: OCI component, not total book equity.

candidates.row_label: Share of other comprehensive income (loss) from equity accounted investments
candidates.why: OCI from associates, not equity total.
Investment asset, not total equity.
Represents equity attributable to owners of the parent; excludes Non-controlling interests and matches equity-only numerator for BE.
Total equity including non-controlling interests; using this could double-count MIB in denominator.

variables.notes: Uses the parent-only equity line (Total Equity), which excludes Non-controlling interests that are mapped separately to MIB.

candidates.why: Income allocation to non-controlling interests; flow item, not the balance sheet amount but confirms presence of minorities.
Same as above; income allocation line.

candidates.row_label: Non-controlling interests share of comprehensive income
candidates.why: Comprehensive income allocation, not the equity balance.
Balance sheet line for non-controlling interests; primary choice for MIB.
Alternative label for same balance sheet item across periods; useful fallback.

variables.notes: Maps MIB to the balance sheet non-controlling interest lines, providing both label variants as a priority list for different periods.
